Class RistoranteDAOImpl

java.lang.Object
theknife.server.dao.impl.RistoranteDAOImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
RistoranteDAO
public class RistoranteDAOImpl extends Object implements RistoranteDAO
Implementazione concreta di RistoranteDAO tramite JDBC e PostgreSQL.
Author:
Mirashaj Erik 760453 VA, GorchynskYi Igor 757184 VA, Kabuka Dan Mumanga 757708 VA, Mujeci Lorenzo 757597 VA
